productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Unisex Court Sequence Black Shoes
description: The adidas Court Sequence is a shoe best known for its stylish looks and quality leather upper. The upper is made of suede and aniline leather, both of which are natural materials.  Referencing the modern sneaker with a tennis-style twist, the Court Sequence is a shoe-closet essential that panders to the most demanding comfort junkie's foot-wear needs!UpperSuede and aniline leather upper with overlaysadidas 3-Stripe overlays at the midfoot regionPadded mesh innerReinforced overlay at the heel collarCentral lace-upsPadded tongue with brandingPerforations on the toe boxMidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with patterns and flex grooves Pivot point at the heel for easy rotation of footShoe careWipe surface with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
